fields.raw: SelectSelector( SelectSelectorConfig( options=[ cls.value for cls in SensorDeviceClass if cls != SensorDeviceClass.ENUM ], sort=True, mode=SelectSelectorMode.DROPDOWN, translation_key="sensor_device_class", ), )
